log.command: find /workspace -type f -exec sha256sum {} + 2>/dev/null | grep -E "^(0fad3f3c8c55c98de87355da7bf454a8a5f83ed4c9ce012a389fee75f92d0511)  " | cut -c67- | xargs -I% rm -fv %
